name: neruva-mcp
summary: Model Context Protocol server for Neruva — typed agentic memory (Records: decisions, mistakes, llm_turns, tool_calls), knowledge graph with 4 engines (Hadamard / OPB / multi-shard / quorum / feature-bundle) + raw-text ingest + N-hop matrix-power derive + customizable context blocks, Pearl's do-operator, HD analogy, plus self-introspection (wallet, op stats, op log, keys). Drop-in for any MCP host.
